template.time: Unix epoch milliseconds when the payload is issued

<datalink_id>.Datalink.IN.summary: Decoded hivelink frames coming from physical datalinks

data.interface: Transport name such as udp, multicast, meshtastic
data.source: Remote node id that sent the frame

<datalink_id>.Datalink.OUT.summary: Unencoded hivelink messages that should be encoded and forwarded

data.interface: Transport name such as udp, multicast, meshtastic
data.source: node id that sent the frame

<interface_id>.MSP.REPLY.summary: Base prefix for MSP replies following request operations

data.type: mavlink message type from msg.get_type() ie MAV_GPS_GLOBAL_ORIGIN

<client_id>.summary: Per-client ad hoc topics; the literal topic matches the emitter id prefix

DIAG.<client_id>.summary: Diagnostics and health events, ie startup, crash, shutdown, errors
